title: Assistant Store Manager - V-Mart Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - V-Mart Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!
